title: MCP tool registration & argument parsing in main.go is untested
evidence: main.go:52 registerTools and the per-tool closures (arg coercion, results[0].Text indexing) have no test; package coverage is 62.8% (test_coverage=0.62775 from scores.json), and only store/ and tools/ handler logic is exercised
suggestion: Add a test that builds the MCPServer, lists registered tools, and invokes a tool handler end-to-end (or extract registerTools into a testable unit)

title: Competition filter has no test and season-only search is restricted to Brasileirão
evidence: tools/tools.go:42 applies the competition filter but no test covers it; store/store.go:196 FindMatchesBySeason only returns Competition=='Brasileirao Serie A', so a season-only search can never surface Copa do Brasil/Libertadores even though R5 spans all three
suggestion: Add a test for the competition filter and let season-only searches span all competitions before narrowing

title: Date-range match filtering not implemented (only season/year)
evidence: store/store.go:196 FindMatchesBySeason filters by integer season only; no handler accepts a start/end date. R4 ('date range and/or season') is satisfied via season, but the date-range half is absent
suggestion: Add optional from/to date parameters to search_matches

title: BR-Football-Dataset.csv is loaded but never queryable
evidence: store/store.go:88 loads s.Extended (corners/shots/attacks) but buildIndex (store.go:120) never adds it to s.all, so the extended statistics are dead data and unreachable by any tool
suggestion: Either surface extended stats via a tool or stop loading the file

title: TeamStats win-rate variable misnamed 'homeRate'
evidence: tools/tools.go:125 computes Wins/Played over all matches but names the variable homeRate; the label printed is 'Win Rate', so output is correct but the variable name is misleading

title: TDD prompt: end-state test coverage present; red-green-refactor process not verifiable from archive
evidence: 25 test functions across loader/, store/, tools/ map 1:1 to the query capabilities (store_test.go, tools_test.go); the archive has no git history, so the incremental test-first cycle the prompt mandates can only be inferred from the thorough final suite
suggestion: None — end-state goal (thorough unit-test coverage of requirements) is met
